title: The Balochistan Sales Tax on Services Rules, 2018 Examination
description: Comprehensive 100-question bar-level assessment based on the 2018 Rules.

questions.text: Under Rule 1(3), when did the Balochistan Sales Tax on Services Rules, 2018 officially come into force?
According to the definitions in Rule 2, 'Beaching' is specifically defined as a service connected with:
options: Guiding a ship to a parking slot near the shore
Bringing out a ship from deep water for the purpose of breaking
Dismantling an obsolete vessel for scrap
Making fast a boat with lines at a secured place
The conveyance of goods by watercraft

questions.text: The 'E-declaration administrator' must hold a rank not below which of the following?
What is the specific 'Tax fraction' formula provided under Rule 2(30)?
Under Rule 2(14), the act of guiding or providing a parking slot for a ship or vessel in water near the shore is termed:
If a registered person provides taxable services from multiple premises but has a centralized billing system in the province, how many registrations are required under Rule 4(2)?
options: One registration for each type of service
Two registrations: one for HQ and one for branches
Registration is not required for branches

questions.text: Under Rule 5(3), the Authority shall issue a provisional certificate of registration within how many days of receipt of the application?
According to Rule 5(4), the Authority shall regularize a provisional certificate of registration within a period of:
Under Rule 6, taxpayers already registered with the FBR will be automatically registered and assigned an NTN with which prefix?
Under Rule 9, a registered person must intimate any change in particulars of registration within how many days of such change?
Following an application for change in registration particulars, the Authority must approve or reject the request within how many days of receipt?
According to Rule 11(3), an application for de-registration shall be disposed of within ____ days, extendable by ____ days.
Rule 12(1) allows for temporary inactivation of registration if a person fails to file returns for how many consecutive tax periods?
Once a registration is temporarily inactivated, Rule 12(2) requires the Authority to give notice stating reasons within how many days?
Orders for suspension or cancellation of registration must be communicated to PRAL within how many days of the order date?
Rule 15 states that a return must be filed within how many days from the due date for payment of tax?
Under Rule 17, the due date for payment of sales tax is usually the ____ day of the month following the tax period.
According to Rule 21(1), a registered person may file a revised return resulting in increased tax payment within how many days of filing the original return?
Rule 20 mandates a scanned attachment as evidence if input tax claimed on goods exceeds what percentage of output tax?
Who is authorized to grant approval for amendments in a Computerized Payment Receipt (CPR) under Rule 18?
Under Rule 23(1), which of the following cannot be appointed as an e-intermediary?
options: A person qualified as an authorized representative under Sales Tax Rules, 2006
A person approved by the Authority
A person convicted of an offense under the Act within the last 5 years

questions.text: What action may the Authority take under Rule 24(2) pending consideration of an e-intermediary's cancellation?
Rule 26(1) allows a registered person to claim missed input tax adjustment in returns for any of the ____ succeeding tax periods.
Under Rule 27, input tax credit is specifically NOT allowed for which of the following?
options: Goods acquired as stock in trade
Utilities in the name of the registered person
Vehicles falling under Chapter 87 of the First Schedule to the Customs Act
Services used for taxable economic activity
Goods purchased 15 days before registration application

questions.text: Input tax credit is disallowed for goods and services purchased or acquired how many days before making a registration application?
According to Rule 27(8), the amount of sales tax paid in excess of ____ percent on taxable goods is not allowed as input tax adjustment.
Under Rule 28(12), a Debit or Credit Note leading to a reduction in output tax must be issued within ____ days of the relevant supply.
The Commissioner may extend the 180-day period for issuing Debit/Credit notes by a further ____ days under Rule 28(12).
Under Rule 30(b), a refund claim is inadmissible if filed after a lapse of ____ from the date of payment of tax.
Which officer has pecuniary competence to sanction a refund claim of 450,000 rupees?
Which officer has 'Unlimited' pecuniary competence to sanction refund claims under Rule 31?
Under Rule 33(3), refund cheques must be issued as:
According to Rule 35, where must the authorized officer forward the file after sanctioning a refund claim?
options: To the Commissioner for final signature
To the State Bank of Pakistan

questions.text: Under Rule 40(2), if a service is provided over time and billed upon completion, the 'time of supply' is the earlier of completion or:
options: The date the contract was signed
The date the invoice was printed
The receipt of payment (partial or full)

questions.text: Rule 42(1) requires a tax invoice to include which of the following for the service provider?
For telecommunication services under Rule 43(3), sales tax for post-paid services must be paid by the:
options: Last day of the following month

questions.text: For incoming international calls, the sales tax must be paid by the 21st day of the month following the month in which:
options: The invoice was issued to the foreign operator

questions.text: Rule 43(8) requires a monthly statement for telecommunication services to be submitted by which day of the following month?
Under Rule 44(4)(b), the threshold for annual turnover of restaurants and caterers to be liable for sales tax is:
The turnover threshold for restaurants does NOT apply if the restaurant is:
Under Rule 44(4)(b)(v), a restaurant is taxable regardless of turnover if its utility bills exceed ____ in any month during a financial year.
Under Rule 44(4)(d), food served by flight-kitchens on-board conveyances leaving for a destination outside Pakistan is:
options: Subject to a fixed fee per meal

questions.text: According to Rule 44(5), which of the following is NOT included in the value of taxable services for marriage halls and lawns?
Rule 44(6)(g) specifies that clubs must pay sales tax by the ____ day of the ____ month following the tax period.
Clubs must submit a quarterly statement under Rule 44(6)(h) by the 24th day of the month following the quarter ending in:
options: Any four months chosen by the club

questions.text: Under Rule 45(4), the value of taxable advertisement services is the gross amount charged or total consideration, ____.
Under Rule 46(6)(b), for 'post-paid' or 'to pay at destination' inter-city transportation, tax must be paid by the 15th day of the ____ month following the tax period.
According to Rule 47(3), the value of taxable shipping agent services is based on the gross commission charged on the:
Rule 47(9) prohibits the Assistant Collector of Customs from granting final port clearance to a ship unless the shipping agent furnishes:
options: Proof of filing return and proof of payment of sales tax
A copy of the vessel's registration
A certificate from the Chamber of Commerce
A security deposit equivalent to the tax

questions.text: Under Rule 48(3), the value of taxable services for stevedores is commissions/fees relatable to cargo originating from or destined to:
Rule 50(6) sets a specific tax rate for Bills of Lading and House Bills of Lading issued by freight forwarding agents at:
Services provided by a freight forwarding agent (other than issuance of Bills of Lading) are charged to tax at ____ under Rule 50(6).
Under Rule 51(2), which of the following is NOT excluded from the value of taxable service for Customs Agents?
options: Fee or commission realized from the client

questions.text: Rule 52(10) requires advertising agents to submit a quarterly statement by the last day of which months?
Under Rule 54(4), if a sponsorship service provider does not have a place of business in Balochistan, who is responsible for tax payment?
If a sponsorship is charged partly in kind, Rule 54(5) states the value of taxable services shall:
options: Exclude the value of articles in kind
Include the value of articles supplied in kind
Be based only on the cash component

questions.text: Under Rule 56(4), property builders and developers are allowed how much input tax credit?
options: No input tax credit or adjustment

questions.text: Under Rule 56(6), if a builder refunds instalments to a buyer due to cancellation, they are entitled to:
options: A credit note valid for 1 year
Claim refund of the tax paid
Adjust it against future output tax only
Transfer the tax credit to the new buyer

questions.text: Rule 57(5) requires courier service providers to intimate particulars of all service outlets within ____ of commencement of registration.
Under Rule 57(7), how much input tax adjustment is available for courier services?
options: No input tax adjustment shall be available

questions.text: If a courier consignment is destroyed beyond human control and charges are refunded, the tax is:
Under Rule 59(7), an annual audit report of an insurance company must be submitted to the Commissioner within ____ of its receipt from the chartered accountant.
Short payment of tax found during an insurance company's audit must be paid within ____ days of receiving the audit report.
Banking companies are not required to issue tax invoices under Rule 60(5); instead, which document is treated as an invoice for adjustment?
options: Bill or advice issued by the company

questions.text: Under Rule 60(10), banking institutions must file quarterly reconciliation statements by the ____ of the month following the end of the quarter.
Under Rule 62(3), which of the following is specifically EXCLUDED from the value of taxable service for a Toll Manufacturer?
options: Raw materials procured by the manufacturer
Inputs received from the service recipient
Utility costs incurred by the manufacturer

questions.text: Toll Manufacturers are eligible for input tax credit on materials they procure themselves under which Rule?
Rule 64(4) states that if a stockbroker purchases stocks from their own resources for sale, tax is paid on:
options: The commission worked out on open market rates
The difference between buy and sell price

questions.text: Under Rule 66(4), if an indenter receives commission from a person resident outside Pakistan, the value is treated as:
Under Rule 68(1), auctioneer rules apply to auctions of the right to collect ____, fees and other levies.
Under Rule 69(4), the value of taxable service for currency exchange is ____ paisa for every one hundred rupees equivalent exchanged.
Rule 71(1) states that airport charges for ____ are liable to sales tax, unless provided to the armed forces of Pakistan.
Under Rule 73(3), if there is no formal agreement specifying considerations for franchise services, the value shall be ____ percent of the franchisee's turnover.
For the beverage sector under Rule 73(5), if no agreement exists, the value of franchise services is 10% of the turnover or 10% of the value of ____, whichever is higher.
Under Rule 74(5), construction service providers must maintain records of which of the following?
options: Approved building plans and structural drawings

questions.text: Under Rule 75(3), which of the following is excluded from the taxable value of labour and manpower supply services if reimbursed on an actual basis?
options: Salary and allowances of the labour supplied

questions.text: Which of the following persons is NOT authorized to represent a taxpayer under Rule 78?
options: A full-time employee of the taxpayer
An advocate entered in the rolls
A person retired from a tax department in a post not inferior to Assistant Commissioner
A family member of the taxpayer with no legal training

questions.text: A person who retired from the tax department is disqualified from representing a taxpayer for ____ from their date of retirement.
Under Rule 79, which condition disqualifies a person from being an authorized representative?
options: Being a resident of another province
Working for more than three taxpayers
Having less than 5 years of experience

questions.text: What is the scope of a 'Special Audit' under Rule 85?
options: To find criminal evidence of tax evasion
Expression of professional opinion on whether records are properly maintained
To prepare the registered person's tax returns
To replace the annual statutory audit

questions.text: Under Rule 87(2), if a penalty is applied to a special auditor and they already received payment, they must return it within ____ to the Authority.
An Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) committee must submit its report within how many days of its appointment under Rule 90(3)?
Under Rule 96, if tax is determined through an adjudication order, when is recovery action prohibited?
options: During the period prescribed for filing an appeal
Until the Commissioner gives written permission
Only if the taxpayer is a company
During the first 15 days of the month

questions.text: Who acts as the 'Referring officer' for the recovery of tax under Rule 99?
options: The Assistant Commissioner in whose jurisdiction the case falls

questions.text: A 'Recovery officer' must hold a rank not below which of the following?
Under Rule 107, a notice for attachment of property gives the defaulter how many days to pay before attachment occurs?
According to Rule 111, private alienation of property after a notice under Rule 107 has been served is:
options: Valid if to a family member
Voidable at the option of the defaulter

questions.text: Under Rule 116, property exempt from attachment includes all properties exempted by which law?
Rule 117(1) allows for the sale of property if dues are not paid within ____ from the date of attachment.
Under Rule 118, negotiable instruments and shares may be sold through which method instead of public auction?
Under Rule 122, a purchaser may apply to set aside a sale on the ground of no saleable interest within how many days?
The period to set aside a sale may be extended by the recovery officer by another ____ days in extraordinary situations.
Rule 127 prohibits which persons from bidding for or purchasing property at an auction?
options: Officers having a duty to perform in connection with the sale

questions.text: Under Rule 128, the sale proceeds are first utilized for:
According to Rule 141, the Authority shall keep records of each electronic transmission for a period of ____ years.
Under Rule 145, if a person transmits e-invoices in real time, they are NOT required to provide:
options: Summary of sale invoices with the monthly return

questions.text: Rule 151 allows an adjudicating officer to ____ multiple show cause notices issued to a single person.
Under Rule 154, frivolous requests for ____ aimed at delaying adjudication shall be declined by recording reasons.
According to Rule 157, electronic adjudication via video conferencing shall be honored if found:
options: Feasible and not detrimental to the proceedings
The only way to contact the taxpayer

questions.text: Under Rule 161, if a case is decided via 'Summary Adjudication', it does NOT extinguish the right of the person to:
